title: Junior Data Analyst
required_skills: Ability to stay organized with messy or incomplete data
core_responsibilities: Review and clean datasets, spreadsheets, and supporting materials into usable working files
Check figures, categories, and source consistency to verify analytical accuracy
Prepare summary tables, structured notes, and analytical support materials
Identify gaps, anomalies, inconsistencies, or weak comparisons in data
Support internal and client-facing decision-support work where factual basis matters
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Data quality, tracking & QA experience as direct evidence of analytical discipline and accuracy
Emphasize experience structuring and verifying data in cross-functional analytics contexts
Showcase any Excel/Google Sheets usage in past roles (e.g., marketing KPI frameworks, cohort analysis)
Add a brief SQL mention if any exposure exists, even basic coursework or personal projects
Frame C-level data storytelling as evidence of translating messy inputs into clear, reliable outputs
